_comment: Capability/policy control plane (DESIGN §6.2). HUMAN-WRITABLE ONLY: this document is the control plane. Agents READ it (GET /api/policy shows the effective result) but never write fleet/config/* — that is the can-modify-policy guardrail. Install it by writing this JSON to the brain at key fleet/config/policy.json (e.g. via the S3/Tigris API as the control-plane operator). effective = merge(defaults, roles[role], fleet/<id>/policy.json), most-specific non-nil wins.
